features.name: enable-license-validation
features.description: If enabled, the package will validate the license against the server; if disabled, no validation will occur. This ensures that active clients remain unaffected during license server deployments or downtime.

features.name: enable-license-validation-dev
features.description: If enabled, the package will validate the license against the server; if disabled, no validation will occur. This ensures that active clients remain unaffected during license server deployments or downtime. (On dev environment)
